probes.label: POST /admin/test/reset with sentinel cookie
probes.notes: Verifies the long-standing admin-test-reset dual guard still rejects shadow tokens on prod.

probes.label: GET /course/status with sentinel cookie
probes.notes: PRIMARY security probe. Whether 401 (auth-layer rejection) or 404 (route-drift rejection), the security property under test — bypass cookie not honored — is satisfied. Harness fails non-zero only if neither acceptable code is returned. Lead adjudicates the final verdict in the post-deploy summary.
